stayIntro: We want your stay to be relaxing and carefree—that's why we keep things simple and transparent.
footer: Thank you for choosing Pamporovo Villa. Taking care of our home is a shared responsibility—by looking after it, we keep it nice for every future guest. Do you have a question? We’re always here to help.
highlights: We welcome guests year-round, 24/7. Please bring a form of identification upon check-in.
Are you in a hurry on your last day? Late check-out after 11:00 a.m. is free, when possible.
Firewood — 10 € per bag, available upon request or at check-in.
Quiet hours: 11:00 p.m. – 7:00 a.m., for everyone’s peace and quiet. Smoking is permitted only on the two terraces (€50 fine for smoking indoors).
No pets allowed. For your safety, the property is equipped with video surveillance.
prohibited: Importing Personal Electrical and Gas Appliances
Behavior that disturbs the peace and quiet of the neighboring villas
